NestedLoopJoinExec: join_type=Inner, filter=n_regionkey@1 > r_regionkey@0
  GpuScanExec: batch_size=29826161
  GpuScanExec: batch_size=29826161
--- memory ---
total_cost=284
NestedLoopJoinExec: row_width=140, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, input_bytes=72, output_bytes=72, cost=144
  GpuScanExec: row_width=68, subtree_max_row_bytes=68, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=68, cost=68
  GpuScanExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=72, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=72, cost=72
